taxonomy: Tragacantha stenolepis is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. This classification places it within the larger subfamily Faboideae, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Tragacantha stenolepis is closely related to other species such as Acacia and Astragalus. The classification of Tragacantha stenolepis also reflects its physical characteristics, including its woody stems and compound leaves. Further research into the taxonomy of this species may provide additional information about its classification within the plant kingdom.
